generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While strategic autonomy sounds good in theory, it's making us LESS secure. Our allies are cutting back on shared defense commitments because they see us pulling away. Meanwhile, our own preparedness is lagging. We can't afford to go it alone when threats are more interconnected than ever. #NationalSecurityFirst #ThinkBeforeYouAutonomy
